title: Mobri B22 LED Colour Changing Light Bulbs with Remote Control, 75 Watt Equivalent Bayonet Dimmable Colour Bulbs with Timing, Memory & Sync, 120 Multi RGB Colours + Daylight White,1 Pack
features: ❤Colour Changing Light Bulb : With more options 120 multi colour, it will meet your needs for a variety of colour and mood lighting.
❤RGBW LED Light Bulb: Can be used for general lighting,equal to 75W incandescent. Various decorative lighting, coloured mood lighting.
❤Dual Memory: Can memorize the last mode and brightness or mode. There is no need to set the colour you like or brightness you need, it it very convenient.

❤DIY FLASH and SMOOTH: Smooth mode, colour tone is more softly making the atmosphere more comfortable (speed adjustable) DIY FLASH is a dynamic jump mode. The program can be set for colour and order. There are five kinds of speed option. It supports not only multiple lights working at the same time but also keeps the consistent frequency of colour changing

❤FACTORY DIRECTLY SUPPLY: The product includes: colour changing light bulb * 1, remote controller * 1, user maual*1.More than 10 years experience in researching and development of light bulbs, 18-month warranty and 30 days money back for Amazon customers. If you have any problem, Please do not Hesitate to contact us.
description: This is a RGB ( 120 colour choices )+W ( daylight white ) LED colour changing light bulb with remote control for home use, both for mood lighting and daily illumination. 1, Updated Remote Controller Icon. More intuitive and easy to operate, and one remote can control multiple light bulbs, and one light can be controlled by multiple remote controls. 2.High Quality Aluminum Shell The ideal material for LED heat dissipation which can extend the lifespan. 3. Daylight white Colour Temperature=6500K, CRI: > 80, Equivalent 75W incandescent bulb. 4.Humanized Dimmable Function Dimming Through the remote control, can be dimmed to least brightness as night light without affecting the sleeper. 5.120 Kinds of RGB Colours You can get 120 different colours by pressing the 6 buttons on the colour wheel, Compared to the old 16 colours, It greatly reduce the possibility of not finding your favorite colour. 6.Three Storage keys(DIY❤) To store the colour you choose from the colour wheel, one key to start when you need it next time. Note: Press the 'DIY❤' FIRST before using the Colour wheel. 7.Smooth and Flash: Smooth Mode: More softly tone make atmosphere more comfortable. Flash Mode: Dynamic flash mode, there are 5 speeds to be adjusted. Memory Function: Yes Sync Function: Yes Watts: 10W Input Voltage: 85-265V Colour Temperature: 6500K Brightness: 900LM (Cool White) CRI：> 85 RGB Colours: 120 Different RGB colours Beam Angle: 270°
